description: The Full WASM Cascade. Fix in order: (1) FIRST fix `scripts/deploy.sh` — the build context is wrong: replace the trailing `.` with `"$BASE_DIR"` so Docker reads from the right directory. (2) Add 'js' feature to getrandom 0.2 in Cargo.toml. (3) Update wasm-bindgen to '^0.2.98'. (4) Add `getrandom_backend` rustflag to `.cargo/config.toml`. (5) FINAL fix: uuid pulls in getrandom v0.3 as a transitive dep — use a Cargo package alias: `getrandom-wasm3 = { package = "getrandom", version = "0.3", features = ["wasm_js"] }`. Do NOT use [patch.crates-io].

initial_files.rust_dashboard_app.Dockerfile:
FROM rust:1.75-slim-bookworm AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/target/server/release/dashboard-app /app/
CMD ["/app/dashboard-app"]

initial_log:
ERROR: failed to compute cache key: '/app/target/server/release/dashboard-app': not found
Sending build context to Docker daemon  2B

checks.error_msg:
error: target wasm32-unknown-unknown not supported
   = help: enable the 'js' feature for getrandom

error: failed to select a version for wasm-bindgen
   = required by getrandom v0.3.0 -> requires ^0.2.98
error: The wasm_js backend requires --cfg getrandom_backend=wasm_js
error: uuid pulling in getrandom 0.3 without wasm_js feature alias
